body.title: Token-aware context-load cutoff
body.result: Replaced 60-line heuristic with explicit 2000-token budget in context-load skill. Added token counting guidance (4 chars ≈ 1 token) and required token count in briefing output. More accurate than line-based estimate, especially as channel history grows.
body.description: Replace 60-line heuristic in context-load with 2000-token character-count cap for more accurate budgeting
